case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. SCOTT JOHN ANDERSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2020 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON SEP-10-2020 AT 9:25 AM IN DEPT. 611, JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW. (206)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2020 - TRIAL DE NOVO IS HELD. COURT HEARS ARGUMENT FROM BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS 1-6(COPIES OF PHOTOGRAPHS) MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE. PARTIES REQUEST THAT THE COURT DESTROY THE EXHIBITS. THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGMENT SUBSEQUENTLY FILED AND ENTERED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, SCOTT JOHN (DRIVER AND REGISTERED OWNER)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2020 - CONTINUED TO MAY-07-2020 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 PER COURT ORDER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT ANDERSON, SCOTT JOHN (DRIVER AND REGISTERED OWNER) ANDERSON, DIANA S (REGISTERED OWNER) RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $75.00 SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, SCOTT JOHN (DRIVER AND REGISTERED OWNER) ANDERSON, DIANA S (REGISTERED OWNER) $1,886.05 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,886.05, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. BUS DAMAGE ON MASONIC STREET, COLLIDED WITH CAR DOOR OPENED ON MOVING TRAFFIC SIDE BY DEFENDANT SCOTT ANDERSON. COURT FINDS DEFENDANT VIOLATED CALIFORNIA VEHICLE CODE 22517 BY OPENING THE CAR DOOR WHEN IT WAS UNSAFE TO DO SO. AND FINDS DEFENDANT ACTED NEGLIGENTLY AND THE CITY AND COUNTY IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2020 - CONTINUED TO SEP-10-2020 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 ON COURT MOTION.
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION - DESTROYED PRIOR TO DOCKET RETURN)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-08-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, DIANA S (REGISTERED OWNER)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED NOV-08-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, SCOTT JOHN (DRIVER AND REGISTERED OWNER)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) WIFE DIANA ANDERSON APPEARING FOR HUSBAND. FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDERSON, SCOTT JOHN (DRIVER AND REGISTERED OWNER)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2020 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT ANDERSON, SCOTT JOHN (DRIVER AND REGISTERED OWNER) ANDERSON, DIANA S (REGISTERED OWNER) MAILED TO RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUL-22-2020 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 BY COURT. (525)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,886.05 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, SCOTT JOHN (DRIVER AND REGISTERED OWNER) ANDERSON, DIANA S (REGISTERED OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, DIANA S (REGISTERED OWNER)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN CLAIMS. DEFENDANT SCOTT JOHN ANDERSON IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WIFE DIANA ANDERSON. DEFENDANT DIANA ANDERSON PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2020 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAR-26-2020 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-10-2020 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525.
MINUTES FOR SEP-10-2020 9:25 AM
